info.name: 07 — Digital Human: MuseTalk Audio Lip Sync
info.description: Drive a portrait photo with an audio file to generate lip-synced video. The mouth movements are generated directly from speech audio — perfect for text-to-speech scripts. Inputs are file paths inside the ComfyUI /input/ folder. Upload your portrait (PNG/JPG) and speech audio (WAV/MP3) to ComfyUI input folder first.
info.model: MuseTalk (chaojie/ComfyUI-MuseTalk, ~4.2 GB on first run: UNet + Whisper + SD-VAE + DWPose)

inputs.video_path: Path to portrait image inside ComfyUI input folder, e.g. input/my_face.png — supports image or short video
inputs.audio_path: Path to speech audio inside ComfyUI input folder, e.g. input/my_speech.wav — WAV or MP3
inputs.bbox_shift: Adjust mouth bounding box vertical offset (default 0). Try -5 to 5 if mouth region is misaligned.
inputs.batch_size: Frames processed per batch (default 4). Reduce to 2 if OOM.

info.tip: To produce a talking-head video from text: (1) generate speech audio with any TTS tool, (2) upload portrait + audio to ComfyUI input folder, (3) update the two path widgets, (4) Queue.
